subject: WM-0057 review: changes_requested
body: High: packages/sim-core/src/m3-save-replay.ts:441 reruns from seed after load instead of resuming from loaded owner state; High: tools/sim-replay-diagnostics-lib.mjs:537 compares resumed run to shortened expectedResume and reports expected hash, hiding resumed read-model mismatch 0x3c8a9532 vs uninterrupted 0x0f12213c.
